metaData.Key Information: Electronic Contact Cleaner is a residual-free formulation that quickly dissolves and removes oil, grease, flux, condensation, and other contaminants from delicate electronic circuitry. It is safe to use on a wide variety of plastics and prevents degradation of electrical signals, For use on computers, circuit boards, HI-FIs, switches, precision instruments and more.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

metaData.Key Information: Deep cleaning gives a renewed appearance to your tire. Tire Foam Cleaner can permeate, clean, refresh and protect the tire all at once. It can remove grease and smudge from tire and protect tires from UV-rays to prevent aging and cracks. It can rejuvenate tires, bumpers and other rubber parts.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

metaData.Key Information: WD-40 Multi-Use Product protects metal from rust and corrosion, penetrates stuck parts, displaces moisture and lubricates almost anything. It even removes grease, grime and more from most surfaces. WD-40 Multi-Use Product lubricates moving parts such as hinges, wheels, rollers, chains, and gears. It protects against rust and corrosion on items like tools, and sporting equipment. It penetrates to free stuck corroded parts like nuts, bolts, valves and locks. It quickly removes adhesives, corrosion and paint. It displaces moisture to restore water flooded equipment such as engines, spark plugs and power tools. Features: - Protects metal surfaces. - Drives out moisture. - Frees sticky mechanisms. - Removes grease, grime, and gunk. - Lubricates. 70ml - THE PERFECT SIZE FOR DIY ENTHUSIASTS AND HOBBYISTS. Small enough for your hobby toolbox, strong enough for thousands of uses. - Easy storage in a hobbyist or modeller's toolbox for handy, anytime use. - Quick fix for gamers with console joystick drift. -Travels easily with you for hobby conventions and outdoor activities.<
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place
